_comment: Tests query scoring across a mixed SEO/content corpus: verifies stop-word suppression, log-normalized TF variant, and that a term appearing in all docs scores zero. Query 'technical seo audit' should surface the technical-SEO-focused documents highest.

corpus.text: Technical SEO audit involves crawling your website to identify broken links, duplicate content, missing canonical tags, and slow page load times. A thorough technical SEO audit improves indexability and crawl efficiency.
Content marketing strategy focuses on creating high-quality blog posts, infographics, and videos to attract organic traffic. Great content earns backlinks naturally and supports long-term SEO growth.
Keyword research identifies search terms your target audience uses. Tools like keyword planners reveal search volume, keyword difficulty, and related keyword suggestions for SEO campaigns.
Link building acquires backlinks from authoritative external websites to boost domain authority. Guest posting, digital PR, and broken link building are common link acquisition strategies.
Page speed optimization reduces load time through image compression, lazy loading, browser caching, and minifying CSS and JavaScript. Core Web Vitals scores directly influence Google search rankings.
On-page SEO covers title tags, meta descriptions, header hierarchy, internal linking, and keyword placement within body content. Proper on-page optimization signals relevance to search engines.

Crawl budget management ensures search engine bots spend their limited crawl allocation on high-value pages. Blocking low-value URLs in robots.txt and fixing crawl traps improve technical SEO crawl efficiency.
Schema markup adds structured data to HTML so search engines can display rich snippets in results. Common schema types include Article, Product, FAQ, and BreadcrumbList for enhanced SERP visibility.
Local SEO optimizes a business presence in location-based search results. Google Business Profile, NAP consistency, local citations, and review management are key local SEO ranking factors.

SEO analytics tracks organic traffic, click-through rate, average position, and conversion rate using tools like Google Search Console and analytics platforms. Data-driven SEO decisions improve campaign performance.
